_readme: Mathematics & Science lesson content comes from GET /api/content
(published/Grade_6). Topic IDs below must match data/topics.js.
After editing, restart the server or POST /api/config/reload
published: true  → topic is reviewed and shown in student timetable
published: false → topic is hidden from timetable (not yet reviewed)
To show a new topic: set published to true and reload the server.
